review_title: A good an SEO tool that helps optimize websites
description: Overall, I would definitely recommend Ninjaseo to anyone looking for a comprehensive and user-friendly SEO tool. It's helped me to improve my website's visibility and traffic, and I'm confident it can do the same for others.
author: John S.
pros: One of the things I like most about this software is how easy it is to use, even for someone who's not necessarily an SEO expert. The interface is intuitive and straightforward, and I appreciate how the data is presented in a clear and organized way.Another feature of Ninjaseo that I appreciate is its versatility. It includes a range of tools and features for keyword research, on-page optimization, link building, and more, which makes it a comprehensive solution for all of my SEO needs. Plus, the software is regularly updated and improved, which shows that the developers are committed to keeping it up-to-date and relevant.
cons: One potential downside of Ninjaseo is that it can be a bit overwhelming at first. There are so many features and tools available that it can be hard to know where to start, especially if you're new to SEO. However, once you get the hang of it, the software becomes much easier to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Web Crawler I Have Used So Far
author: Tejas R.
pros: I usually used Screamingfrog for crawling and check any SEO errors. But after certain point, it's not possible due to some limitations. Then I stumbled upon NinjaSEO. It was really good. I could check all the essential data of my blogs and landing pages. That was really helpful. Apart from crawling, the other features are also quite useful and seamless in terms of functionality. I liked it.
cons: So far I haven't find a con. I was checking the SERP rank tracking feature, but didn't see much negative in that too. Can beat Ahrefs Rank Tracker too. So no cons as of now.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Aşkın T.
pros: It's a good seo tool. Even with its free feature, you can try and understand what kind of software it is. Its features are satisfactory but a bit slow.
cons: It's running slow and asking us to install google plugin. It's annoying that this is mandatory.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: El mejor rastreador web e indispensable para llevar tu SEO a otro nivel
description: No he tenido problemas durante el uso de NinjaSEO, incluso me atrevo a decir que puede superar sin problemas a otras herramientas similares.
author: alexandra A.
pros: Ninja SEO es una herramienta creada para ayudar a los webmasters y propietarios de negocios a mejorar el rendimiento de sus sitios web en cuanto a las búsquedas en línea. Identifica y analiza todos los errores de optimización de motor de búsqueda (SEO) en un sitio web y ofrece consejos para corregirlos. También proporciona información sobre la densidad de palabras clave, el análisis de enlaces y el seguimiento de rankings. Además, Ninja SEO brinda a los usuarios la capacidad de supervisar y comparar el rendimiento de sus sitios web con el de sus competidores.
cons: Ninja SEO es una herramienta increíble para todos los webmasters y dueños de negocios en línea. Ha mejorado significativamente el ranking de mi sitio web en los motores de búsqueda y, como resultado, he obtenido más tráfico y ventas. Lo recomiendo mucho a cualquiera que busque mejorar su sitio web y aumentar sus ingresos.

review_title: Muchas herramientas para mejorar el SEO de tu sitio web
author: Sabino Eduardo Q.
pros: NinjaSEO es una herramienta increíble con la que he mejorado el SEO de mis sitios web. Es sorprendente lo fácil de usar y la amplia variedad de funciones muy útiles que incluye. Desde la optimización de títulos y descripciones hasta las métricas de seguimiento de mi rendimiento en los motores de búsqueda, estoy muy satisfecho con NinjaSEO ya que he conseguido mejorar mi estrategia SEO, con contenidos de calidad, y tomando acciones ante puntos débiles en mi Web..
cons: Llevo usando NinjaSEO hace mucho tiempo y no he tenido problema alguno, y ante algún inconveniente el equipo de soporte te asesora.

review_title: The Right Marketing Software For You
description: Since we decided to track our organization, NinjaSEO has been the tool by excellent, to perform our tracking activities, monitoring backlinks, and getting metrics to make decisions.
author: Jose Pablo V.
pros: after using NinjaSEO software and its tools, my team and I have discovered how useful is this tool for all our tracked information and mentions, where we have been able to monitor backlinks and getting all insights in our on-page optimization for company's site. My team uses this wonderful tool every week to track our metrics and also see how the changes work and are doing.
cons: After using this software, I would like to say there are many features that you can feel overwhelmed, otherwise is very good.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Ranking Is Easy When You Have NinjaSEO
description: When google don't love Off-page SEO (especially they don't like backlink), then you have only option to rank your articles of your website. In that situation, NinjaSEO is the first choice to do the perfection of on-page SEO to rank my website quickly with easy keywords.
author: Md Billal Hossain S.
pros: - Easy to use - Able to find on-page problems easily - Powerful on-page fixer - Google ranking factors can able to use easily
cons: - No option to use NLP to optimize an article with the term

author: Verified Reviewer

cons: - Search engine algorithms and ranking factors are constantly changing- esults can be unpredictable and may vary depending on a variety of factors

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: program necessary for any type of business management, easy and comfortable to use
cons: some more functionality, perhaps more analysis management

description: I have been using NinjaSEO for a few months now, and compared to the other SEO tools that I have used, this is the best one so far. Not only does it work great on my Chrome browser, it also integrates with my WordPress website. I am on the free plan, and it works great for my needs.
author: Alex A.
pros: NinjaSEO is a very useful SEO tool for tracking your rankings, monitoring your backlinks and getting insight into what your on-page optimization is doing for your site. I am using it a lot to track my metrics and see how my changes are doing.
cons: you need to watch some tutorials to get the hang of it, but support is very responsive!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Uno de los softwares en la nube más completos para SEO
description: Lo que más me ha gustado de NinjaSEO es que resulta muy fácil de usar.
author: Pablo P.
pros: Lo que más me ha gustado es que tiene muchas herramientas y funcionalidades. Destaca el web crawler, que permite rastrear webs sin necesidad de software y todo en la nube. Tiene otras muchas funcionalidades que merecen la pena, incluso cuenta con extensión para Google Chrome.
cons: Como ocurre en muchas herramientas "todo en uno" de este tipo, teniendo tantas funcionalidades no es especialmente buena en ninguna, pero para llevar proyectos de clientes o propios no muy grandes cumple muy bien.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
